articles.title: Sources: U-M regents to decide on AD Manuel soon
articles.description: The University of Michigan regents are expected to discuss an investigation into the culture of its athletic department on Thursday, sources told ESPN, and as part of the review, a decision on the future of AD Warde Manuel is expected in the coming days.
